type.description: The Change Type: feat, fix, feat!, fix!. Vocabulary borrowed from Conventional Commits; dv does not parse commit messages. Determines the Bump.

packages.description: Package names this Record affects. Resolved through .dv/renames.yaml.

links.description: Issue / PR URLs. Rendered in the CHANGELOG entry if present.

notes.description: Reviewer-only notes. Never rendered to CHANGELOG.

title: dv Record (.dv/records/*.md frontmatter)
description: YAML frontmatter for one pending Record (specs/record-format.md).
